description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a long, narrow fuselage and three prominent cylindrical engines mounted on each side of the rear section. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the midsection, with small protruding elements at the tips that may serve as stabilizers or weapon mounts. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a tinted canopy, providing a clear view for the pilot. The surface is predominantly metallic with blue and black accents, and the engines have visible red exhaust ports. The tail section is minimalistic, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer, and the undercarriage does not display any visible landing gear. The overall appearance suggests a high-speed, advanced aircraft suitable for urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with three rear-mounted engines, straight mid-mounted wings, and a forward enclosed cockpit, finished in metallic blue and black.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, three cylindrical engines stacked vertically at the rear, and the straight wing extending from the midsection.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the three large engine exhausts with red ports and the narrow tail section, with the wings and stabilizer tips visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same engine and wing configuration with clear visibility of the fuselage's length.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical arrangement of the engines and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and small wingtip devices; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Triple jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage, horizontally aligned.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with no visible vertical stabilizer; horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
